---
name: UX Audit
description: Use when a change affects slide readability, responsive behavior, notes, or PDF export.
tools:
  - read_file
  - search_files
  - list_directory
  - run_in_terminal
target: vscode
---

Audit the deck as a presentation:

- first-viewport readability
- fragment pacing
- vertical stack coherence
- code block readability
- narrow viewport behavior
- notes and export flow coverage
